formulation_candidates.raw_label: MF-loaded nanoparticles, MF NPs, MF-loaded PLGA NPs

component_candidates.ambiguity_note: Used to adjust formulation volume to 2 mL.
Used as cryoprotectant at different concentrations for variations in Table 2, not a fixed component of the initial MF NPs preparation.
Used as cryoprotectant at different concentrations for variations in Table 2, not a fixed component of the initial MF NPs preparation.

variable_candidates.ambiguity_note: Specific concentrations are not provided in the text.

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: 2.2. Preparation of MF NPs. MF-loaded nanoparticles were prepared using the nanoprecipitation method13 with modiﬁcation.
evidence_spans.supporting_text: MF-loaded nanoparticles were prepared using the nanoprecipitation method13 with modiﬁcation.

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: The organic phase, consisting of 2 mg of MF and 6 mg of PLGA in 1 mL of acetone, was rapidly poured into 2 mL of aqueous solution containing 0.1% (w/v) Solutol HS 15.
evidence_spans.supporting_text: The organic phase, consisting of 2 mg of MF and 6 mg of PLGA in 1 mL of acetone, was rapidly poured into 2 mL of aqueous solution containing 0.1% (w/v) Solutol HS 15.

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: The suspension was stirred at 900 rpm for 24 h to allow complete evaporation of the organic solvent, and the formulation volume was adjusted with water to 2 mL (Figure 2).
evidence_spans.supporting_text: The suspension was stirred at 900 rpm for 24 h to allow complete evaporation of the organic solvent, and the formulation volume was adjusted with water to 2 mL (Figure 2).

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: Then, the formulation was centrifuged for 1 min at 3000 rpm to discard debris.
evidence_spans.supporting_text: Then, the formulation was centrifuged for 1 min at 3000 rpm to discard debris.

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: Mometasone furoate (MF) was purchased from Acros Organics (New Jersey, USA).
evidence_spans.supporting_text: Mometasone furoate (MF) was purchased from Acros Organics (New Jersey, USA).

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: PLGA-Purasorb PDLG 5010 (50:50) with an inherent viscosity midpoint of 1 dL/g was kindly donated by Corbion Purac (Gorinchem, the Netherlands).
evidence_spans.supporting_text: PLGA-Purasorb PDLG 5010 (50:50) with an inherent viscosity midpoint of 1 dL/g was kindly donated by Corbion Purac (Gorinchem, the Netherlands).

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: Solutol HS 15 (Macrogol 15 hydroxystearate) was kindly supplied by BASF (Ludwigshafen, Germany).
evidence_spans.supporting_text: Solutol HS 15 (Macrogol 15 hydroxystearate) was kindly supplied by BASF (Ludwigshafen, Germany).

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: Acetone and methanol were purchased from Sigma-Aldrich (Rehovot, Israel).
evidence_spans.supporting_text: Acetone and methanol were purchased from Sigma-Aldrich (Rehovot, Israel).

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: In the present study, sucrose and mannitol were used as cryoprotectants at diﬀerent concentrations, and the physicochemical properties of MF NPs were measured by DLS after freeze-drying (Table 2).
evidence_spans.supporting_text: In the present study, sucrose and mannitol were used as cryoprotectants at diﬀerent concentrations, and the physicochemical properties of MF NPs were measured by DLS after freeze-drying (Table 2).

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: The NPs are assumed to be stable throughout the freeze-drying process if the ratio Sf/Si is close to 1, with an upper limit of 2.44−46
evidence_spans.supporting_text: The NPs are assumed to be stable throughout the freeze-drying process if the ratio Sf/Si is close to 1, with an upper limit of 2.44−46

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: Moreover, the drug loading content was 22.4 ± 0.5% (w/w), where most of the existing nanomedicines usually do not reach values higher than 10% drug loading content.30
evidence_spans.supporting_text: Moreover, the drug loading content was 22.4 ± 0.5% (w/w), where most of the existing nanomedicines usually do not reach values higher than 10% drug loading content.30

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: In a previous study, the MF encapsulation eﬃciency in PLGA NPs and WGA- conjugated PLGA NPs using an emulsion−solvent evaporation technique was 78 ± 5.5 and 60 ± 2.5%, respectively.21
evidence_spans.supporting_text: In a previous study, the MF encapsulation eﬃciency in PLGA NPs and WGA- conjugated PLGA NPs using an emulsion−solvent evaporation technique was 78 ± 5.5 and 60 ± 2.5%, respectively.21

evidence_spans.source_locator_text: In this study, MF-loaded PLGA NPs were successfully prepared using the nanoprecipitation method with a mean particle size of 117 nm and a satisfactory polydispersity index (PDI) of 0.26 (Table 1 and Figure 3A)
evidence_spans.supporting_text: In this study, MF-loaded PLGA NPs were successfully prepared using the nanoprecipitation method with a mean particle size of 117 nm and a satisfactory polydispersity index (PDI) of 0.26 (Table 1 and Figure 3A)

unassigned_observations.note: Stability criterion for freeze-drying, not a direct measurement of the current NPs.
Encapsulation efficiency from a previous study, not the current formulation.
